content.body: Does anyone here have access to the full ISO/IEC 80000-3:2019 Quantities and units Part 3: Space and time standard? Its 2006 edition included an Annex B: "Units based on the foot, pound, second, and some other related units" which provides references for `in`, `ft`, `yd` and `mi` abbreviations, but I don't have access to the updated text, which might have dropped that annex.
content.formatted_body: Does anyone here have access to the full ISO/IEC 80000-3:2019 Quantities and units Part 3: Space and time standard? Its 2006 edition included an Annex B: "Units based on the foot, pound, second, and some other related units" which provides references for in, ft, yd and mi abbreviations, but I don't have access to the updated text, which might have dropped that annex.
